I'm here to help you.","time":1770640461},{"role":"AGENT","author":"Noah Williams","body":"We are pleased to inform you that after extensive back-and-forth communication with NinjaTrader/Tradovate, we have successfully confirmed the list of users affected by the platform outage on 4 February. This outage prevented some traders from logging in or making modifications to their orders.

 We sincerely apologize for the delay in processing the adjustments. Our team has been working closely with NinjaTrader/Tradovate to generate and validate the affected traders’ data. Due to certain technical constraints, we were unable to retrieve the complete list earlier, which unfortunately caused a delay in the final process.

 As communicated on the day of the incident, we will mitigate the negative impact of this outage. We have confirmed that adjustments will be applied for traders who had trades that:
 - Were opened before 08:20 AM CT, and
- Were closed between 08:54 AM and 10:30 AM CT

 Any negatively impacted order or trade that falls within the above criteria will be rectified. The adjustments will be processed after today’s market break.","time":1770640755},{"role":"AGENT","author":"FundedNext AI","body":"Just wanted to check if you're still with me. [{"role":"USER","author":"durgesh kumar dhaker","body":"CFD / Forex","time":1770640123},{"role":"AGENT","author":"FundedNext AI","body":"Hi there! 😊

 How can I assist you today?

 E-mini contracts: ये mid-sized contracts हैं जो micro contracts से बड़े होते हैं लेकिन standard contracts से छोटे।
 Micro E-mini contracts: ये E-mini contracts का 1/10th size होते हैं, यानी कम capital requirement के साथ trading कर सकते हैं।
 Conversion ratio:
 • Rapid accounts में: 1 e-mini = 5 micro contracts
 • Legacy accounts में: 1 e-mini = 10 micro contracts
 तो "3 minis, 9 micros" का मतलब है आप maximum 3 e-mini contracts या 9 micro contracts trade कर सकते हैं। ये limits account size और type के हिसाब से set होती हैं।
 क्या आप FundedNext CFDs या FundedNext Futures के बारे में पूछ रहे हैं?","time":1770640175,"bot":true},{"role":"USER","author":"durgesh kumar dhaker","body":"futures","time":1770640224},{"role":"AGENT","author":"FundedNext AI","body":"Perfect! FundedNext Futures में "3 Minis, 9 Micros" का मतलब है:
 Contract Limits:
 • 3 e-mini contracts या 9 micro e-mini contracts - ये आपकी maximum position size है
 • ये 1:3 ratio maintain करता है (1 e-mini = 3 micro contracts Rapid accounts में)
 Key Points:
 • Contract limits account creation के time set होती हैं और profits के साथ increase नहीं होतीं
 • Micro E-mini contracts, E-mini contracts का 1/10th size होते हैं
 • इन limits को exceed करना violation माना जाता है
 Example: अगर आप 1 e-mini contract trade कर रहे हैं, तो आप additional 6 micro contracts भी trade कर सकते हैं (total equivalent: 3 e-mini)
 ये limits risk management के लिए designed हैं while trading flexibility maintain करने के लिए।","time":1770640241,"bot":true},{"role":"AGENT","author":"FundedNext AI","body":"क्या आप यही ढूंढ रहे थे?","time":1770640242,"bot":true},{"role":"AGENT","author":"FundedNext AI","body":"अगर आपको अभी भी "3 Minis, 9 Micros" के बारे में या FundedNext Futures से जुड़ी कोई और मदद चाहिए तो मैं यहाँ हूँ। क्या आप अपने ट्रेडिंग सवाल या किसी और जानकारी के बारे में और विस्तार से बताना चाहेंगे?","time":1770640483,"bot":true},{"role":"AGENT","author":"FundedNext AI","body":"Your current position in the queue is 0.

 Maximum Loss Limit — 6% (Trailing Drawdown)
 - Set at 6% of your starting balance.
- Trails your highest real time balance and increases only with growth.
- Doesn’t reduce after losses — it only goes up.
- Capped at your initial balance, no matter how much growth you make.
 Example:

 Qualification Criteria

- At least $250 is required for every cycle before the withdrawal request.
 Withdrawals
 - Withdrawable Amount: Profit above $52,100
- Minimum Withdrawal Amount: $250
- Maximum Withdrawal Amount: $1,200
- Reward Share: Traders receive 80% of the approved Performance Reward amount.
- Minimum Trading Days: Not required.
 Bolt Withdrawal Journey
 - Maximum number of withdrawals: 5
- For the First 4 Withdrawals:
 - A minimum $250 profit in the current cycle is required.
- Traders can withdraw profits only when their EOD balance is above $52,100.
- Any profit above $52,100 is eligible for withdrawal (subject to the $250–$1,200 limits).
 1. 5th Withdrawal (Final Settlement)
 - Once a trader's EOD balance reaches at least $52,100 and has at least $250 profit in the current cycle, they become eligible for a withdrawal.
- After the eligibility, the trader can withdraw all profits, including the buffer amount — meaning anything above $50,000 is withdrawable, up to $7,700.

 When you move to the next tier:

- Your reward share updates.
 Reward Share by Tier:
 - Tier 1–2: 70%
- Tier 3 onward: 80% (capped)
 In simple terms, tiers are just growth stages of your account. [{"role":"USER","author":"Customer","body":"CFD / Forex","time":1770740051},{"role":"AGENT","author":"FundedNext AI","body":"Hi there! 😊

 How can I assist you today?

 Just so you know, I’m an AI assistant, and while I aim to be accurate, there might be a margin of error.","time":1770740055,"bot":true},{"role":"USER","author":"Customer","body":"Gentile Supporto di FundedNext,
 Sto valutando l'acquisto del vostro programma [specificare qui il programma, es.: "Express Challenge" o "Stellar Challenge"] e, prima di procedere, ho bisogno di una conferma scritta ufficiale su due punti fondamentali per la mia strategia di trading automatizzata.
 Trading durante le news macroeconomiche: È esplicitamente consentito aprire nuove posizioni e chiudere posizioni esistenti DURANTE gli annunci ad alto impatto (come NFP, decisioni sulle tariffe FED/BCE, dati CPI), SENZA alcuna finestra di divieto temporale (ad esempio, NON sono ammesse restrizioni del tipo "divieto di aprire nuovi trade da 15 minuti prima a 15/30 minuti dopo l'evento")?
 Durata massima delle operazioni: Esiste un limite di tempo massimo (ad esempio, 5, 10 o 30 giorni) entro cui un singolo trade deve essere obbligatoriamente chiuso? In altre parole, i trade vengono chiusi automaticamente dal sistema dopo un certo periodo?
 La mia strategia si basa su un Expert Advisor (EA) che potrebbe detenere posizioni per diversi giorni e operare in qualsiasi condizione di mercato. Una vostra chiara conferma per iscritto su questi due punti è essenziale per me.
 Vi ringrazio in anticipo per la vostra tempestiva e precisa risposta.
 Cordiali saluti,
 [Il Tuo Nome]","time":1770740069},{"role":"AGENT","author":"FundedNext AI","body":"Sì: su FundedNext CFDs il news trading è consentito, quindi puoi aprire e chiudere posizioni durante le news anche nella Challenge Phase.
 Detto questo, quando sei su un FundedNext account (non nella Challenge Phase), durante le news ad alto impatto si applica una regola specifica che riguarda i profitti generati in una finestra di 10 minuti (5 minuti prima → 5 minuti dopo la pubblicazione).
 In quella finestra:
 - sui trade in profitto, viene accreditato il 40% del profitto sul saldo;
- sui trade in perdita, il 100% della perdita resta a tuo carico (non viene rimosso).
 Sulla “durata massima delle operazioni” e l’eventuale chiusura automatica dopo X giorni: nelle informazioni disponibili qui non è indicato alcun limite temporale massimo per singolo trade né una chiusura automatica a tempo.","time":1770740084,"bot":true},{"role":"AGENT","author":"FundedNext AI","body":"È quello che cercavi?","time":1770740084,"bot":true},{"role":"AGENT","author":"FundedNext AI","body":"Se hai bisogno di ulteriori chiarimenti o assistenza riguardo al trading durante le news o alla durata delle operazioni, sono qui per aiutarti. How can I help you today?","time":1770740699},{"role":"USER","author":"Customer","body":"salve,","time":1770740739},{"role":"AGENT","author":"Ashley Stinson","body":"I understand your concern.","time":1770740742},{"role":"AGENT","author":"Ashley Stinson","body":"News trading is allowed in both the Challenge Account and the FundedNext Account. However, once you start trading in your FundedNext Account, specific rules apply to news trading.

 If you open or close any trades within a 10 minute window around a high-impact news event, which includes 5 minutes before and 5 minutes after the event, those trades will fall under the News Profit Split Rule. In this case, you will only receive 40% of the profit made from those trades.

 To learn more about this topic, you can refer to this article.","time":1770740749},{"role":"AGENT","author":"Ashley Stinson","body":"FundedNext allows holding trades overnight across all current account types (Stellar 1-Step, Stellar 2-Step, and Stellar Lite). There are no restrictions on holding positions overnight. However, when it comes to weekend holding, it can vary based on the account you are using.

 - Allowed: Challenge Accounts, Free Monthly Competition Accounts, and Free Trial Accounts.
- Not allowed: All FundedNext Accounts (after passing the Challenge).
 Accounts where weekend holding is not allowed:
 - Stellar 1-Step FundedNext Account
- Stellar 2-Step FundedNext Account
- Stellar Lite FundedNext Account

 Once you transition to a FundedNext Account, you cannot hold positions over the weekend. All running positions must be closed before market closure, and you cannot hold trades through any rollover/market break longer than 2 hours. We recommend closing running/pending orders manually; otherwise, the system will automatically close them.

 Swap charges apply when you hold positions overnight (except on Swap-Free Accounts); they’re calculated based on the instrument type, are visible in MT5 by right-clicking a pair and selecting “Specification,” and they count toward your Daily Loss Limit calculation. Also note the triple swap days: Forex & Commodities incur 3x swaps on Wednesday, while Indices & Crypto incur 3x swaps on Friday. Example: Holding XAUUSD (gold) through Wednesday night incurs three days’ worth of swaps, affecting floating P&L and potentially triggering risk breaches if not monitored.

 For detailed information on this topic, traders are encouraged to refer to FundedNext's article.","time":1770740764},{"role":"USER","author":"Customer","body":"mi chiedevo se ci fossero restrizioni in merito agli account e se quello appena fornito vale per tutte le opzioni","time":1770740791},{"role":"USER","author":"Customer","body":"quindi al fundedaccount devo chiudere nel weeked?","time":1770740838},{"role":"AGENT","author":"Ashley Stinson","body":"Yes, you cannot hold your trades over the weekend in the FundedNext Accounts.","time":1770740867},{"role":"AGENT","author":"Ashley Stinson","body":"Si prega di notare che la regola di detenzione delle operazioni è un po' diversa per i conti Stellar Instant.","time":1770740917},{"role":"AGENT","author":"Ashley Stinson","body":"You'll be glad to know that we allow overnight/weekend holding for Stellar Instant Accounts.

There are no restrictions on holding positions overnight. However, when it comes to weekend holding, it can vary based on the account you are using.

 - Allowed: Challenge Accounts, Free Monthly Competition Accounts, and Free Trial Accounts.
- Not allowed: All FundedNext Accounts (after passing the Challenge).
 Accounts where weekend holding is not allowed:
 - Stellar 1-Step FundedNext Account
- Stellar 2-Step FundedNext Account
- Stellar Lite FundedNext Account

 Once you transition to a FundedNext Account, you cannot hold positions over the weekend. All running positions must be closed before market closure, and you cannot hold trades through any rollover/market break longer than 2 hours. We recommend closing running/pending orders manually; otherwise, the system will automatically close them.

 Swap charges apply when you hold positions overnight (except on Swap-Free Accounts); they’re calculated based on the instrument type, are visible in MT5 by right-clicking a pair and selecting “Specification,” and they count toward your Daily Loss Limit calculation. Also note the triple swap days: Forex & Commodities incur 3x swaps on Wednesday, while Indices & Crypto incur 3x swaps on Friday. Example: Holding XAUUSD (gold) through Wednesday night incurs three days’ worth of swaps, affecting floating P&L and potentially triggering risk breaches if not monitored.

I am here to assist you today.","time":1770638799},{"role":"AGENT","author":"Jax Volt","body":"FundedNext allows holding trades overnight across all current account types (Stellar 1-Step, Stellar 2-Step, and Stellar Lite). There are no restrictions on holding positions overnight. However, when it comes to weekend holding, it can vary based on the account you are using.

 - Allowed: Challenge Accounts, Free Monthly Competition Accounts, and Free Trial Accounts.
- Not allowed: All FundedNext Accounts (after passing the Challenge).
 Accounts where weekend holding is not allowed:
 - Stellar 1-Step FundedNext Account
- Stellar 2-Step FundedNext Account
- Stellar Lite FundedNext Account

 Once you transition to a FundedNext Account, you cannot hold positions over the weekend. All running positions must be closed before market closure, and you cannot hold trades through any rollover/market break longer than 2 hours. We recommend closing running/pending orders manually; otherwise, the system will automatically close them.

 Swap charges apply when you hold positions overnight (except on Swap-Free Accounts); they’re calculated based on the instrument type, are visible in MT5 by right-clicking a pair and selecting “Specification,” and they count toward your Daily Loss Limit calculation. Also note the triple swap days: Forex & Commodities incur 3x swaps on Wednesday, while Indices & Crypto incur 3x swaps on Friday. Example: Holding XAUUSD (gold) through Wednesday night incurs three days’ worth of swaps, affecting floating P&L and potentially triggering risk breaches if not monitored.

 For detailed information on this topic, traders are encouraged to refer to FundedNext's article.","time":1770639222},{"role":"AGENT","author":"Jax Volt","body":"Is there anything else I can help you with?","time":1770639632},{"role":"AGENT","author":"FundedNext AI","body":"Just wanted to check if you're still with me.
